zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：震荡偏弱延续整理格局
zh.content:
当前SOL/USD整体处于震荡偏弱结构，价格围绕71美元附近横盘运行，短期多空动能均不足，市场缺乏明确突破方向，整体延续整理格局。

技术指标方面，SMA20位于71.71附近，价格略低于均线，短线承压明显。MACD维持负值，动能柱偏弱，RSI缺失但整体动量偏空。

下方支撑关注70.65一线，若跌破可能进一步下探70关口；上方阻力在71.70至71.80区间，突破需放量确认信号。

交易策略建议以区间操作为主，未有效突破前避免追涨杀跌，可在70.6附近分批低吸，71.8上方冲高谨慎减仓并设置止损操作。

en.title: Solana vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Solana against the US dollar is currently in a short-term consolidation phase with a slight bearish bias. Price action is compressing between recent intraday extremes while failing to establish a clear upward continuation. Trading just under the 20-period SMA suggests sellers are marginally dominant. Overall structure reflects indecision after a prior move, with momentum flattening and market participants waiting for a breakout or breakdown signal.

Momentum indicators reinforce the cautious tone. The MACD reading remains negative at -0.4155, indicating downside pressure is still present, even if weakening. With no visible RSI or signal line provided, confirmation from oscillators is limited, but price behavior suggests reduced buying strength. The absence of bullish divergence keeps risk skewed to the downside, though volatility remains compressed, which often precedes directional expansion.

Key support is located at the recent low near 70.65, which has been tested within the 24-hour range and now acts as immediate downside protection. A break below this level opens a path toward the psychological 70 zone. On the upside, resistance is clustered at 71.70–71.73, aligning with the SMA20 and recent high. A sustained move above this band could shift momentum toward a recovery phase.

Trading conditions favor range strategies until a breakout confirms direction. Buying near support with tight risk control below 70.30 offers favorable reward-to-risk, while partial profit-taking near resistance is prudent. Alternatively, traders may wait for a decisive close above 71.75 to pursue momentum longs. Failure to hold 70.65 would increase bearish exposure and likely accelerate selling toward lower support zones.
